name: Black Bean Burgers (Curtis')
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked black beans, rinsed and drained
sesame seed or onion burger buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Salsa: In a mixing bowl, gently stir together avocado and salsa until well blended. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
2. Burgers: Combine black beans, bulgur, sour cream, scallion, parsley, cumin, hot pepper sauce, salt, and black pepper in the bowl of a food processor. Process until the mixture is chopped, but not pureed. Divide the mixture into 4 portions and form into burgers. Wrap and refrigerate about 30 minutes to 1 hour before cooking.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Fry the burgers in hot oil for about 5 minutes on each side or until brown and crisp.
4. Place slices of cheese on the burgers during the last minute of cooking time.
5. Serve the burgers with salsa and your favorite condiments, if desired.
